flags.message: Snapshot is a bare metadata stub: docket_entries is empty and date_filed/date_argued/date_cert_granted/date_cert_denied/date_terminated are all null. No substantive docket content, question presented, or order text is available, so the disposition prediction rests entirely on structural base rates (docket number 93-7515 -> OT1993 IFP docket; petitioner vs the United States). Expected for an older SCOTUS stub, not a run failure, but the estimate cannot be refined beyond the IFP cert-denial base rate.
